author: rhoades-brown
description: Sync your Obsidian vault with GitHub using the Octokit API. Two-way sync, multi-repo support, visual diffs, conflict resolution, and auto-sync — no Git CLI required. Works on desktop and mobile. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: M Rhoades-Brown
manifest.description: Sync your vault with GitHub using the Octokit API.
manifest.name: GitHub Octokit Sync

name: GitHub Octokit Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Summary

Adds optional syncing of the Obsidian configuration folder and significantly improves unit test coverage.

## Changes

### Configuration Sync
- Added `syncConfiguration` setting to optionally sync the `.obsidian` folder
- When disabled (default): entire config folder is excluded from sync
- When enabled: config files are synced except always-excluded items
- Always excluded regardless of setting:
  - `{configDir}/github-sync-metadata.json` (local sync state)
  - `{configDir}/plugins/**` (plugins are managed separately)
- Fixed: Config folder files are now properly tracked using the adapter API (`vault.getFiles()` doesn't include config files)

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed file deletions not being pushed to GitHub
- Fixed logs view not displaying newest entries first

### UI Changes
- Renamed "Sync triggers" section to "Sync behavior"
- Moved "Sync configuration folder" toggle to be first option in Sync behavior section

### CI
- Added ESLint step to CI workflow (runs before build)

### Test Coverage
- Increased from 51 to 98 tests (+47 new tests)
- Added tests for: `isBinaryFile`, `hashBinaryContent`, `computeGitBlobSha`, `computeGitBlobShaBinary`, base64 encoding/decoding, effective ignore patterns, path conversion, file modification detection

## What's Changed
* feat: Add configuration sync option and improve test coverage by @rhoades-brown in https://github.com/rhoades-brown/obsidian-github/pull/10


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rhoades-brown/obsidian-github/compare/0.2.0...0.3.0
releases.name: 0.3.0 - Add configuration sync option
